## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and discussion between Olivier Labbé (Inflection) and Marcel Santilli (fwd.digital) about their current business ventures and experiences.](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Olivier is transitioning from tech to acquiring blue-collar businesses, starting with electrician companies](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Marcel's company fwd.digital is experiencing rapid growth in AI-powered content marketing services](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=494.0)
  - [fwd.digital is considering a Series A funding round of $10-15 million, with strong financials and market traction](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Both discussed challenges and strategies in scaling businesses and fundraising](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

## Topics

### Olivier's Career Transition

  - [Left operating role 1.5 years ago after building products and generating $400K ARR](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=102.0)
  - [Started consulting practice, working half-time for the past 18 months](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Now acquiring blue-collar businesses, starting with commercial and residential electrician companies](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Plans to roll up acquisitions and sell to PE firm in 7-8 years](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=245.0)

### Marcel's Company (fwd.digital) Overview

  - [Provides end-to-end content marketing services with AI-powered workflows](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Pricing: $9,000-$40,000/month per work stream, 12-month contracts](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=674.0)
  - [High-profile clients include H\&N, Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [82-84% gross margins in Q2-Q3, slight dip to 68-69% in Q4 due to hiring](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
  - [Projected to reach $15-16 million ARR by year-end if maintaining current growth rate](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

### fwd.digital's Technology and Operations

  - [Utilizes AI, human expertise, and custom workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
  - [Building components like fact-checkers, research agents, and knowledge base builders](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)
  - [Employs strategists, managing editors, and support staff in pods managing 3-5 accounts each](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Hiring internationally, leveraging AI for talent vetting (3,000 applicants for 5 positions)](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Fundraising and Valuation Discussion

  - [Considering $10-15 million Series A round](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Previous merger offer valued the company at $150 million](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Olivier advised not to exceed 20x multiple for valuation to manage expectations and stress](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

### Market Positioning and Competition

  - [Competing against traditional agencies in the $120 billion/year market](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Leveraging AI and human expertise to outperform competitors](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [Not directly competing with pure AI companies like OpenAI](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to continue managing growth and preparing for potential Series A round](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Olivier to explore agency acquisitions using the merge.com platform](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Both to stay in touch for advice on their respective ventures (fundraising for Marcel, PE acquisitions for Olivier)](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Marcel offered to provide automation insights for Olivier's future local business management](https://fathom.video/share/667MygQd1d5UJYaXuuAiwC-AsfxuFbCr?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
